title: US Admissions Hit Unexpected Wall
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Description: Indian enrolments in the US have dropped by 17% in a year not because students changed plans, but because visa delays, travel barriers, and tighter global policies are reshaping admissions. If you're planning to study in America, the competition is no longer just academic it's logistical and political. Follow Full Disclosure for deeper global education insights.
